unmapped_risk: Authorized Participant creation mechanism failure during a Taiwan Strait blockade or sudden US executive export freeze. When TSM or NVDA trading halts or settlement is frozen by clearinghouses, APs cannot deliver underlying shares to create SMH units. The secondary market price decouples from NAV, triggering cascading margin calls on leveraged holders and forcing fire sales of remaining liquid components, causing a 40%+ drawdown that persists even after the geopolitical shock resolves.
underweighted_risk: Regulatory energy/water caps on hyperscaler data centers acting as a sudden death for AI CapEx. While bears track earnings misses or margin compression, environmental regulators in the EU or key US states can impose immediate power/water usage limits on AI clusters under existing sustainability mandates. This doesn't slow growth linearly—it triggers a forced re-rating from perpetual scaling to regulated utility status, collapsing forward order books for NVDA and TSM overnight.
structural_fragility: The ETF liquidity illusion: SMH's structure assumes continuous tradability of its constituents. During a supply-chain or geopolitical chokepoint, underlying securities halt or face settlement freezes while the ETF continues trading on secondary markets, creating a trapped vehicle where NAV updates lag and forced selling amplifies drawdowns beyond fundamental valuations.
contagion_path: SMH NAV-decoupling triggers margin calls on leveraged semiconductor holders -> forces liquidation of correlated AVGO and LITE positions -> spreads to QQQ via tech weighting drag -> triggers cross-asset volatility spike that reverses SGD flight-to-safety flows, pressuring G3B.SI alongside the thematic layer.
watch_items: SMH intraday discount/premium to NAV widening beyond ±2.5% during normal market hours
SEC or clearinghouse notices regarding TSM/NVDA settlement delays or AP creation halts for semiconductor ETFs
